name: example-admin-glassmorphism
title: Glassmorphism Admin
description: Dark-mode admin built on frosted glass panels — translucent surfaces with backdrop blur over a soft colored aurora gradient, cyan accent, hairline white-alpha borders. Modern alternative to flat-card SaaS admins.

query.en: Make me a glassmorphism admin dashboard for a creator-economy platform — dark, aurora gradient background, frosted glass panels, cyan accent, KPI tiles, revenue chart, top creators table.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Make me a glassmorphism admin dashboard for a creator-economy platform — dark, aurora gradient background, frosted glass panels, cyan accent, KPI tiles, revenue chart, top creators table.
